form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 300m. Last start finished 5th over 400m at this track beaten 10 lengths (23.34) behind Time Has Come in a Grade 5 on March 19. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Well supported here last start but couldn't repay punters, finishing finished 5th on March 30 over 400m at this track behind Aston Crema beaten 8 lengths (23.54) in a Grade 5/6.
